acceptEdits.description: Allows direct file edits. Still asks before higher-risk actions.
acceptEdits.label: Accept edits

bypassPermissions.description: Minimizes permission checks. Best for trusted tasks that need uninterrupted execution.
bypassPermissions.label: Bypass permissions

default.description: Starts conservative. Asks before edits or higher-risk actions.
default.label: Default

dontAsk.description: Won't prompt for approval. Actions not already allowed are rejected.
dontAsk.label: Don't ask

auto.description: Only ask for actions detected as potentially unsafe
auto.label: Approve for me

full-access.description: Unrestricted access to the internet and any file on your computer
full-access.label: Full access

read-only.description: Always ask to edit external files and use the internet
read-only.label: Ask for approval
Read-only
read-only.description: Cursor plans and reads only. Proposes changes without making them.

agent.label: Ask for approval
agent.description: Full tool access. Cursor asks before running commands or other risky actions.

full-access.label: Full access
full-access.description: Runs commands without asking, unless explicitly denied by your Cursor permission rules.

yolo.description: This provider does not support changing permission mode here.
yolo.label: Fixed mode

full-access.label: Full access

read-only.description: Always ask to edit external files and use the internet
read-only.label: Ask for approval

accept-edits.description: Allows file edits, but still asks before higher-risk actions

ask-before-write.description: Always ask to edit external files and use the internet
ask-before-write.label: Ask for approval

auto.label: Approve for me

full-access.description: Unrestricted access to the internet and any file on your computer
full-access.label: Full access

locked-down.description: Won't prompt. Unapproved actions are rejected

unconfigurable.description: This provider does not support changing permission mode here

high.description: Greater reasoning depth for complex problems
high.label: High

max.description: Maximum reasoning depth for the hardest problems
max.label: Max

medium.description: Balances speed and reasoning depth for everyday tasks
medium.label: Medium

minimal.description: Uses the least reasoning for the fastest responses
minimal.label: Minimal

none.description: Disables additional reasoning for the fastest responses
none.label: Off

ultra.description: Maximum reasoning with automatic task delegation
ultra.label: Ultra

xhigh.description: Extra-high reasoning depth for complex problems
xhigh.label: X-High
